description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, featuring a prominent front porch supported by columns and a set of steps leading up to the main entrance. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, and the roof appears flat or minimally sloped, with visible chimneys at the rear corners. Multiple rooms are visible through the open plan, including a central living area furnished with sofas, a dining table, and several smaller rooms branching off, likely bedrooms and utility spaces. The windows are arranged in a regular pattern along the exterior walls, providing ample natural light. Interior furnishings include wooden cabinets, desks, and beds, suggesting a fully equipped residential space. The overall design is functional and straightforward, with a focus on comfort and accessibility.
description: A single-story, light-colored bungalow with a front porch, flat roof, and regularly spaced windows, featuring a central living area and multiple furnished rooms.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rear and one side of the bungalow, highlighting the back rooms, visible chimneys, and some interior furnishings.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the main entrance and front porch, with the central living area and dining space clearly visible through the open doorway.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the opposite rear and side, emphasizing the symmetrical window arrangement and additional interior rooms.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a direct look at the front facade, showcasing the porch, main entrance, and the symmetrical window layout on either side.
